---
title: 'Communication Challenges in Infrastructure-Vehicle Cooperative Autonomous
  Driving: A Field Deployment Perspective'
author:
- Shaoshan Liu
- Bo Yu
- Jie Tang
- Yuhao Zhu
- Xue Liu
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- robotics
url_source: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9770087
journ: IEEE Wireless Comm.
year: 2022
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 62
---
